narrative:
Huber Heights 5-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,125 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
